roa.docketEntryComment: SIGNED ORDER TO DELIVER DEFT TO WALDEN HOUSE FILED
ORDER TO THE DELIVER DEFENDANT TO THE WALDEN HOUSE FILED

/CAL:PRETRIAL/STWPX/X:ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE TSENIN THAT THE DEFENDANT ISRELEASABLE TO THE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AT WALDEN AND TO A REPRESENTATIVE OF WALDEN HOUSE,/CONTD:TRAILING FELONIES ON 5-6-09/

/CAL:TO SET & BWR/BWR:03-09-09/BWR1/SHER/BAIL:1000000/CTORD:ONCE A BEDIN A PROGRAM IS AVAILABLE,THE COURT WILL RELEASE THE DEFENDANT TO SAID PROGRAM/CONTD PC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/CTORD:PC 4011,6 REPORT IS DUE ON 03-17-09/CONTD:4011,6PC RETURN &EXON BAIL

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO03-09-09/X: BAIL SET AT $75000/X:BAIL FORFEITURE STAYED UNTIL 03-09-09/
/CAL:TO SET/X:4-28-09 DATE STANDS FOR PRETRIAL,/X:5-6-09 DATE STAND TRAILING FELONIES,/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: MATTER PREVIOUSLY SETIN DEPT 20/
